title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Stage Directory
description:
The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/stages' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing the commit stages of a job or task. It contains classes like AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java and StageConfig.java, which collaborate to ensure each stage of the commit protocol is executed only once, tracks execution duration, and updates IO statistics. 

AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java, an abstract base class, manages and executes stages of the job or task commit protocol, ensuring single execution of a stage using an 'AtomicBoolean' flag, logging stage entry and exit, updating IO statistics, and handling exceptions. 

StageConfig.java, on the other hand, uses a builder pattern to configure a stage, setting up various parameters required for a stage such as job ID, job attempt number, task ID, task attempt ID, job directories, output temporary sub-directory, task manifest directory, and more. 

The directory employs the Builder pattern for creating immutable configurations and ensures robust error handling and retry mechanisms for saving manifests to the file system. It also demonstrates resilient commit operations with fallback to simple rename if not supported by the store. The directory's architectural role is to manage and orchestrate the commit stages of a MapReduce job, ensuring data durability and consistency.
